report.title: Shared locations list
report.description: A list for locations set up by one but used by another. Choose attribute values.
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM locations l JOIN locations_websites lw ON lw.location_id=l.id AND lw.deleted=false AND lw.website_id=118 #joins# WHERE l.deleted=false AND (l.location_type_id=#location_type_id# OR #location_type_id#=0) AND (l.parent_id=#parent_id# OR #parent_id#=0) #order_by#

param.name: location_type_id
param.description: Select the location type, or leave blank to not filter by location type.

param.name: parent_id
param.description: The parent location id, or leave blank to not filter by parent location

param.name: locattrs
param.description: Comma separated list of location attribute IDs to include
